notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

S12 emits only a synthetic metadata persistence boundary receipt and does not run permission engines, call AuthZ, append audit ledgers, write audit events, persist product state, write databases or storage, write persistence records or stores, persist idempotency or lock records, write idempotency or lock stores, acquire runtime locks, create UI, or persist product state.
Claude P2 attestation-symmetry finding was fixed by adding persistence_store_write_permitted=false to the S12 result surface, validator, fixture, tests, and contract result fields.
